title: WEST TUALITY HABITAT FOR HUMANITY - 211info
text: WEST TUALITY HABITAT FOR HUMANITY WEST TUALITY HABITAT FOR HUMANITY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an opportunity for families to build and buy their own homes. The houses are sold at no profit to homeowner families. 3731 Pacific Avenue Forest Grove, OR 97116 Eligibility: Must meet all of the following requirements: 1) Has a demonstrated housing need 2) Can commit to 250 hours per adult of sweat equity in construction 3) Are United States citizens or permanent residents 4) Have not owned a home in the past 3 years 5) Have the ability to pay a mortgage payment (steady income and decent credit history) Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 359-8459 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 359-8459 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Mortgage lengths vary depending on income and programs that are available. Habitat ensures that the payment (which includes property taxes, insurance, and other fees, if applicable) is no more than 30% of the homeowner’s gross monthly income at the time of sale. DOCUMENTS: Visit website for required documents LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Cities of Banks, Buxton, Cornelius, Forest Grove, Gales Creek, Gaston, Manning, North Plains, and Timber SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus line #57 Services: Home Purchase/Construction Financing/Refinancing Subsidized Home Acquisition Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - FOREST GROVE HABITAT FOR HUMANITY RESTORE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CRITICAL HOME REPAIR PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
